descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione L'opportunità Hitachi Energy è alla ricerca di un esperto SAP Business Analyst che può colmare le esigenze aziendali e la tecnologia guidando soluzioni ERP end-to-end. Questo ruolo consiste nell'analisi dei requisiti, nella definizione del campo di applicazione e nella traduzione di complessi processi aziendali nelle specifiche del modulo SAP, raccomandando al contempo miglioramenti che migliorano l'efficienza e le prestazioni. Come esperto di materia riconosciuta, formerai piani operativi, influenzerai la leadership e guiderai lo sviluppo di processi e standard innovativi che offrono un impatto misurabile. Le forti capacità di comunicazione e la capacità di allineare gli stakeholder con obiettivi strategici sono essenziali per il successo. Condividi su Twitter - Stabilire strutture di governance e organizzazione per garantire ruoli chiari, responsabilità e processi decisionali allineati alle strategie globali. - Fornire una supervisione strategica per i programmi globali, assicurando l'adesione a processi standardizzati e l'adozione completa di sistemi core. - Raccogliere e analizzare i requisiti aziendali, sintetizzare gli input da parte degli stakeholder per allineare con gli obiettivi aziendali. - Gestisci l'imbuto della domanda BU verso SAP CoE in linea con l'archetipo aziendale. - Armonizzazione del processo di piombo e miglioramento continuo, eliminando deviazioni dei modelli e promuovendo le migliori pratiche in tutte le regioni. - Monitorare le prestazioni del processo aziendale attraverso metriche chiave, analisi dei dati e benchmarking rispetto agli standard del settore. - Guidare la governance e la gestione dei dati, garantendo precisione, coerenza e sicurezza attraverso HUB e sistemi. - Valutare e affrontare le esigenze di formazione, fornire risorse e sessioni per migliorare le competenze e le prestazioni del team. - Iniziative di gestione del cambiamento del campione, promozione dell'adozione del processo globale, minimizzazione delle personalizzazione locali, e garantire il buy-in degli stakeholder. - Identificare e mitigare i rischi relativi alle implementazioni del sistema e alle modifiche dei processi, garantendo la conformità ai requisiti normativi. - Guidare e sviluppare team globali, promuovere la responsabilità, la collaborazione e la crescita professionale attraverso coaching e la gestione delle prestazioni. - Collaborare sulla pianificazione del budget e della domanda, condividere le migliori pratiche e mantenere la comunicazione regolare con la gestione BU.
• Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria, Business Administration o campo relativo. - Minimo di 10 anni di esperienza progressiva nella produzione, nella gestione delle operazioni o in ruoli correlati, con una comprovata traccia dei principali team interfunzionali e la gestione di progetti globali. - Forte leadership e capacità di gestione dei cambiamenti, con la capacità di influenzare e motivare team e stakeholder globali. - Conoscenza approfondita delle metodologie di produzione, vendita, logistica, servizi, sistemi e miglioramento dei processi (Lean, Six Sigma). - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione e coinvolgimento degli stakeholder, in grado di trasmettere efficacemente concetti complessi e garantire buy-in a tutti i livelli organizzativi. - Mindset analitico con la capacità di sfruttare i dati per il monitoraggio delle prestazioni, il processo decisionale e le iniziative di miglioramento continuo. Cosa? - Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale. - Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo. - Benefici competitività e vantaggious. Contatto - [Inserisci qui i di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]

En tant qu'expert reconnu en la matière, vous façonnerez des plans opérationnels, influencerez le leadership et dirigerez l'élaboration de processus et de normes innovateurs qui produisent un impact mesurable. Pour réussir, il est essentiel de posséder de solides compétences en communication et de pouvoir aligner les intervenants sur les objectifs stratégiques. Venez loin un impatto - Établir des cadres de gouvernance et d'organisation pour assurer des rôles, des responsabilités et des processus décisionnels clairs, alignés sur les stratégies mondiales. - Assurer la surveillance stratégique des programmes mondiaux, assurer le respect des processus normalisés et l'adoption complète des systèmes de base. - Rassembler et analyser les besoins opérationnels, synthétiser les commentaires des intervenants afin de les aligner sur les objectifs opérationnels. - Gérer l'entonnoir de demande BU vers SAP CoE en ligne avec l'archétype d'affaires. - Coordonner l'harmonisation des processus et l'amélioration continue, éliminer les écarts entre les modèles et promouvoir les meilleures pratiques dans les régions. - Surveiller le rendement des processus opérationnels au moyen de mesures clés, d'analyses de données et d'analyse comparative par rapport aux normes de l'industrie. - Diriger la gouvernance et la gestion des données, en assurant la précision, la cohérence et la sécurité dans les HUB et les systèmes. - Évaluer et répondre aux besoins de formation, fournir des ressources et des séances pour améliorer les compétences et le rendement de l'équipe. - Promouvoir les initiatives de gestion du changement, promouvoir l'adoption de processus mondiaux, minimiser les personnalisations locales et obtenir l'adhésion des intervenants. - Déterminer et atténuer les risques liés à la mise en oeuvre du système et aux changements de processus, en veillant au respect des exigences réglementaires. - Diriger et développer des équipes mondiales, favoriser la responsabilisation, la collaboration et la croissance professionnelle par l'encadrement et la gestion du rendement. - Collaborer à la planification du budget et de la demande, partager les meilleures pratiques et maintenir une communication régulière avec la direction de l'UB.
• Requisiti - Diplôme en technologie de l'information, génie, administration des affaires, ou domaine connexe. - Au moins 10 ans d'expérience progressive dans la fabrication, la gestion d'exploitation ou des rôles connexes, avec une expérience éprouvée de la direction d'équipes interfonctionnelles et de la gestion de projets mondiaux. - De solides compétences en leadership et en gestion du changement, avec la capacité d'influencer et de motiver les équipes et les parties prenantes mondiales. - Connaissance approfondie de la fabrication, des ventes, de la logistique, des processus de service, des systèmes et des méthodes d'amélioration des procédés (Lean, Six Sigma). - Excellentes compétences en communication et engagement des parties prenantes, capables de transmettre efficacement des concepts complexes et d'obtenir l'adhésion à tous les niveaux organisationnels. - Un état d'esprit analytique capable de tirer parti des données pour la surveillance du rendement, la prise de décisions et les initiatives d'amélioration continue.
• Cosa offriamo - Opportunità di crescita professionnelle e personnelle. - Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collarativo. - Benefici competivi e vantaggious. Contatto - [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]

titleByLocale.it: GPG Isolamento e componenti APQP Leader

descriptionByLocale.it: The Opportunity As an GPG Insulation & Components APQP Leader you will be responsible for the implementation and maintenance of Foundation APQP essentials, according to the defined strategy and plan for GPG I&C Quality. You will collaborate with crossfunctional teams ensuring that Foundation APQP essentials are updated according to novelties and new risks. How you´ll make an impact Coordinate the development of Foundation APQP plan. Lead foundation APQP Plan related meetings, collecting and preparing documentation, being main connection point between QMT, Factories, Global experts and R&D. Participate in Foundation FMEA workshops and s upport HUBs and Factories to use foundation APQP essentials (to be cascaded to local products). Support R&D organization to use foundation APQP essentials for new product developments. Support ToT projects to ensure proper transfer of APQP essentials. Act as GPG I&C Plato Admin, train crossfunctional teams, support the organization on the usage and ensure that foundation content is updated . Proactive identification of technology novelties to drive updates in foundation APQP essentials and c ollaborate with GPG Operations to identify global process changes that might affect to foundation APQP essentials ( e.g. from best practices to requirement). Your b ackground Technical degree from the University . 3-5 years of experience with APQP ( preferably in industries like Automotive or Wind). Strong knowledge of APQP processes, FMEA, PPAP, SPC, and MSA methodologies. Experience with Plato is an advatage . Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to identify and implement process improvements. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and facilitate effective collaboration among diverse stakeholders. Fluency in English What w e o ffer Collective agreement and flexible working hours. Health care and wellness allowance. Career opportunities within Hitachi Energ y, locally and globally. Mentor support during onboarding. Training and development programs. A diverse workplace with 70+ nationalities in Sweden. Supplementary parental leave compensation. Access to an Employee Benefit Portal with discounts. We value personal development and diversity, and we are committed to building a sustainable energy future. We are growing and welcome applicants who may not meet every requirement—your potential matters. Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't wait—apply today! jobs.title: High Voltage Testing Engineer 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is a global technology leader in the design and manufacture of high-voltage transformer bushings. Renowned international companies across the electrical industry—including power generation, transmission, and distribution—trust our solutions. We hold a leading worldwide position in high-voltage bushing technology. To strengthen our operations, we are looking for a High Voltage Testing Engineer to join our high-voltage testing team at our MICAFIL bushing factory. If you are passionate about high-voltage testing and want to actively contribute to the future of our production processes, this is your opportunity to make a real impact. How you'll make an impact Plan and execute electrical and thermal type tests as well as special tests on high-voltage bushings (in-house and externally), considering available resources and budget Assist and lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), including in-house FATs with customers Ensure the full functionality and availability of three high-voltage laboratories in collaboration with the team Lead and manage laboratory-related projects Ensure safety of equipment and personnel through training, instructions, and compliance with safety standards Secure quality, traceability, and compliance of bushing process steps through process instructions Perform routine, type, and special tests as required Continuously challenge and improve procedures and instructions as part of Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP) As part of the Operations department, actively support and contribute to daily business activities Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Professional experience in high-voltage technology, testing, or electrical machines, ideally in a production or industrial environment Solid understanding of ISO 9001 and ISO 17025 Business-fluent German and good English, both written and spoken Strong team spirit, high social competence, and enjoyment of working in a multicultural environment Flexible mindset with a strong enthusiasm for technology Proactive and solution-oriented approach to problem-solving More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione
L'opportunità Il nostro gruppo di prodotti locale Insulation & Components è un leader tecnologico globale nella progettazione e produzione di boccole per trasformatori ad alta tensione. Rinomate aziende internazionali nel settore elettrico, tra cui la generazione di energia, la trasmissione e la distribuzione, si affidano alle nostre soluzioni. Abbiamo una posizione leader a livello mondiale nella tecnologia di boccole ad alta tensione. Per rafforzare le nostre operazioni, stiamo cercando un ingegnere ad alta tensione per unirsi al nostro team di test ad alta tensione presso la nostra fabbrica di boccole MICAFIL. Se siete appassionati di test ad alta tensione e volete contribuire attivamente al futuro dei nostri processi produttivi, questa è la vostra opportunità di fare un impatto reale.

## Mansioni
- Pianificare ed eseguire test di tipo elettrico e termico nonché test speciali su boccole ad alta tensione (in-house ed esternamente), considerando le risorse disponibili e il bilancio
- Test di accettazione della fabbrica di assistenza e di piombo (FAT), compresi i FAT interni con i clienti
- Assicurare la piena funzionalità e disponibilità di tre laboratori ad alta tensione in collaborazione con il team
- Guidare e gestire progetti di laboratorio
- Assicurare la sicurezza delle attrezzature e del personale attraverso la formazione, le istruzioni e il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza
- Qualità sicura, tracciabilità e conformità dei passaggi del processo di boccola attraverso le istruzioni di processo
- Eseguire test di routine, tipo e speciali come richiesto
- Sfida e migliora continuamente le procedure e le istruzioni nell'ambito dei processi di miglioramento continuo (CIP)
- Nell'ambito del reparto Operazioni, sostenere attivamente e contribuire alle attività aziendali quotidiane

# Requisiti #
- Corso di laurea o master in ingegneria elettrica o equivalente
- Esperienza professionale in tecnologia ad alta tensione, test o macchine elettriche, idealmente in ambiente produttivo o industriale
- Solida comprensione di ISO 9001 e ISO 17025
- Tedesco fluente e buon inglese, sia scritto che parlato
- Forte spirito di squadra, alta competenza sociale, e il piacere di lavorare in un ambiente multiculturale
- Mindset flessibile con un forte entusiasmo per la tecnologia
- Approccio proattivo e orientato alla soluzione al problem solving

# Cosa #
- Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is a global technology leader in the design and manufacture of high-voltage transformer bushings. Renowned international companies across the electrical industry—including power generation, transmission, and distribution—trust our solutions. We hold a leading worldwide position in high-voltage bushing technology. To strengthen our operations, we are looking for a High Voltage Testing Engineer to join our high-voltage testing team at our MICAFIL bushing factory. If you are passionate about high-voltage testing and want to actively contribute to the future of our production processes, this is your opportunity to make a real impact.

## Mansioni
- Plan and execute electrical and thermal type tests as well as special tests on high-voltage bushings (in-house and externally), considering available resources and budget
- Assist and lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), including in-house FATs with customers
- Ensure the full functionality and availability of three high-voltage laboratories in collaboration with the team
- Lead and manage laboratory-related projects
- Ensure safety of equipment and personnel through training, instructions, and compliance with safety standards
- Secure quality, traceability, and compliance of bushing process steps through process instructions
- Perform routine, type, and special tests as required
- Continuously challenge and improve procedures and instructions as part of Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP)
- As part of the Operations department, actively support and contribute to daily business activities

## Requisiti
- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent
- Professional experience in high-voltage technology, testing, or electrical machines, ideally in a production or industrial environment
- Solid understanding of ISO 9001 and ISO 17025
- Business-fluent German and good English, both written and spoken
- Strong team spirit, high social competence, and enjoyment of working in a multicultural environment
- Flexible mindset with a strong enthusiasm for technology
- Proactive and solution-oriented approach to problem-solving

## Cosa offriamo
- Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow

jobs.title: Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence - BU Transformers
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is seeking a Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence Manager for the Business Unit Transformers to join our team shaping the future of energy through digital innovation, data‑driven insights, and AI‑enabled solutions. In this role, you will drive data‑ and AI‑enabled value creation by converting business strategy into prioritized AI initiatives, ensuring measurable impact across operations, decision‑making, and innovation. This position offers the opportunity to grow your career within the newly established Digital Transformation Organization, collaborate with global stakeholders, and shape the future of Transformer solutions. How you will make an impact Shape the future of data, analytics, and AI by setting a clear strategic direction that drives meaningful business outcomes at scale. Turn real business challenges into AI opportunities that improve decisions, performance, and competitive advantage. Build and lead a high‑impact AI portfolio, taking ideas from early concepts to scaled solutions that create measurable value. Champion responsible and trusted AI by embedding strong governance, ethics, and data standards into everything delivered. Elevate data as a strategic asset by improving quality, consistency, and access to enable powerful insights and AI solutions. Lead diverse, cross‑functional teams to deliver AI initiatives that are practical, scalable, and business‑ready. Learn from results to continuously refine approaches, scale successes, and amplify business impact. Build strong partnerships with business and digital leaders to align priorities and accelerate AI adoption. Strengthen organizational capabilities through targeted learning, clear messaging, and a strong data‑driven mindset. Drive change with confidence by guiding stakeholders through transformation and ensuring responsible adoption of new solutions. Inspire, develop, and grow high‑performing Data, Analytics, and AI teams aligned behind a shared vision. Your background Master's degree in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field. Relevant certifications (e.g., CAIP, advanced AI\/ML certifications) highly valued. Minimum 15+ years of experience in roles related to business process management or program implementation in the manufacturing industry. Effective communication skills with a proven ability to engage diverse stakeholders at all levels, fostering a collaborative environment to drive initiatives. Demonstrated competence in influencing and motivating teams to adopt new processes, reduce resistance, and achieve successful transitions to globally harmonized practices. Deep understanding of data, analytics, AI\/GenAI technologies, machine learning and analytics platforms. Strong analytical skills to tackle complex data and\/or AI challenges. Awareness of ethical considerations in AI development and deployment. Ability to bridge strategy, governance, and execution.

jobs.title: Engineering Global Sustainability Leader
jobs.location: Remote - North Carolina, United States of America
jobs.description:
The opportunity Sustainability starts at the design table—and this role puts you right at the center of that impact. As the Engineering Design Sustainability Lead , you will shape how sustainability is embedded into global engineering decisions across our transformer business. This is a highly visible, strategic role where engineering excellence meets environmental responsibility. You will lead the shift from downstream sustainability activities to design‑led outcomes, ensuring product‑level carbon reduction, material optimization, and environmental performance are built into every design choice from the outset. You will work across global engineering teams to translate sustainability ambitions into measurable, auditable product outcomes—balancing cost, safety, quality, and performance. With increasing expectations from customers, regulators, and stakeholders for credible product‑level data, your work will directly support compliance, ESG reporting, and long‑term business resilience. If you thrive at the intersection of engineering, data, and sustainability—and enjoy influencing without direct authority—this role offers a unique opportunity to shape the future of sustainable product design at scale. How you'll make an impact Define and drive a global, design‑led sustainability strategy within Engineering. Embed sustainability into engineering standards, processes, and decision frameworks. Reduce product‑level carbon footprint through smart design, material, and architecture choices. Establish sustainability targets, KPIs, and traceable product‑level data at BOM level. Partner across engineering, R&D, supply chain, digital and operations teams globally. Strengthen governance, reporting, and audit‑ready sustainability metrics. Build capability and foster ownership of sustainable design within engineering teams. Translate regulatory and customer sustainability expectations into engineering requirements. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Master's degree or PhD in Engineering or a closely related sustainability discipline. 10+ years of engineering experience, including 5+ years in sustainability‑focused roles. Proven success delivering design‑led sustainability or product carbon reduction initiatives. Strong knowledge of lifecycle assessment, sustainable materials, and carbon accounting. Experience leading global, cross‑functional initiatives and influencing senior stakeholders. Strong analytical mindset with a data‑driven approach to decision‑making. More about us At Hitachi Energy , sustainability, innovation, and safety are core to how we design the future of energy. You'll work in a global, diverse environment where ideas are valued and impact is visible. 
• We offer meaningful opportunities to grow, lead, and shape industry‑leading solutions with purpose.

In this role, you will collaborate closely with project management, fellow engineering teams, and customers to deliver the control and protection scope of complex substation automation projects. You will be part of a world class engineering community within our European Hub, working alongside experienced colleagues with deep expertise in the execution of large and technically demanding projects worldwide. This position offers an excellent environment to learn, grow, and make a meaningful contribution to Hitachi Energy's purpose of advancing a sustainable, flexible, and secure energy system. It is a unique opportunity to join the energy transition at a time when electricity is increasingly becoming the backbone of a sustainable society. descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione
L'opportunità Per rafforzare il nostro team, siamo alla ricerca di un Project Engineer – Grid Automation Control & Protection per supportare la riuscita consegna di progetti di automazione della rete in tutta Europa. In questo ruolo, collaborerai a stretto contatto con la gestione dei progetti, i team di ingegneria e i clienti per fornire il campo di controllo e di protezione di complessi progetti di automazione delle sottostazione. Sarete parte di una comunità di ingegneria di livello mondiale all'interno del nostro hub europeo, lavorando insieme a colleghi esperti con profonda esperienza nell'esecuzione di progetti di grandi e tecnicamente impegnati in tutto il mondo. Questa posizione offre un ambiente eccellente per imparare, crescere e dare un contributo significativo allo scopo di Hitachi Energy di promuovere un sistema energetico sostenibile, flessibile e sicuro. È un'occasione unica per unire la transizione energetica in un momento in cui l'elettricità sta diventando sempre più la spina dorsale di una società sostenibile.

# Come farai un impatto #
- Collaborare con il team di progettazione per sviluppare concetti di protezione e controllo per sistemi di trasmissione (sotto), lavorando a stretto contatto con i clienti durante la fase di progettazione di base
- Contribuire e coordinare l'ambito tecnico dettagliato di Protezione e Controllo, lavorando in stretto allineamento con altre discipline ingegneristiche come SCADA e Network & Cyber Security
- Sostenere la progettazione e/o la configurazione di protezione e controllo IED per le sottostazioni di trasmissione (sotto) garantendo soluzioni conformi alle specifiche del cliente
- Partecipare e aiutare a condurre le attività di test di fabbrica presso le nostre strutture di test a Baden (Svizzera), tra cui i test di accettazione di fabbrica (FAT) effettuati in collaborazione con i clienti

# Il tuo sfondo #
- Corso di laurea in ingegneria elettrica o equivalente (ad esempio Technikerschule), con esperienza rilevante nei sistemi di automazione sottostazione
- Conoscenza dei sistemi di controllo e protezione delle sottostazione, compresi gli standard di comunicazione come IEC 61850
- L'esperienza con il portafoglio IED di protezione e controllo di Hitachi Energy (famiglia Relion®) è un vantaggio
- Giocatore di squadra con una forte attenzione alla soddisfazione del cliente, alla sicurezza, alla qualità e all'efficienza
- Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente, coordinando efficacemente con più stakeholder in un ambiente di progetto
- Forte capacità di comunicazione e fiducia nel prendere decisioni tecniche
- Fluente in inglese, sia scritto che parlato, la lingua tedesca è un vantaggio

## More about us
Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity To strengthen our team, we are looking for a Project Engineer – Grid Automation Control & Protection to support the successful delivery of grid automation projects across Europe. In this role, you will collaborate closely with project management, fellow engineering teams, and customers to deliver the control and protection scope of complex substation automation projects. You will be part of a world class engineering community within our European Hub, working alongside experienced colleagues with deep expertise in the execution of large and technically demanding projects worldwide. This position offers an excellent environment to learn, grow, and make a meaningful contribution to Hitachi Energy's purpose of advancing a sustainable, flexible, and secure energy system. It is a unique opportunity to join the energy transition at a time when electricity is increasingly becoming the backbone of a sustainable society.

## How you'll make an impact
- Collaborate with the project core team to develop protection and control concepts for (sub-)transmission systems, working closely with customers during the base design phase
- Contribute to and coordinate the Protection & Control detailed engineering scope, working in close alignment with other engineering disciplines such as SCADA and Network & Cyber Security
- Support the design and/or configuration of protection and control IEDs for (sub-)transmission substations, ensuring solutions meet customer specifications
- Participate in and help lead factory testing activities at our test facilities in Baden (Switzerland), including Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) carried out in partnership with customers

## Your background
- Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering or equivalent (e.g. Technikerschule), with relevant experience in substation automation systems
- Knowledge of substation control and protection systems, including communication standards such as IEC 61850
- Experience with Hitachi Energy's protection and control IED portfolio (Relion® family) is an advantage
- Open-minded team player with a strong focus on customer satisfaction, safety, quality, and efficiency
- Ability to work independently while effectively coordinating with multiple stakeholders in a project environment
- Strong communication skills and the confidence to take technical decisions
- Fluent in English, both written and spoken, German language is an advantage

## More about us
Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Gelegenheit Um unser Team zu stärken, suchen wir einen Projektingenieur – Grid Automation Control & Protection, um die erfolgreiche Lieferung von Netzautomatisierungsprojekten in ganz Europa zu unterstützen. In dieser Rolle werden Sie eng mit dem Projektmanagement, den Ingenieurteams und den Kunden zusammenarbeiten, um die Steuerung und den Schutz von komplexen Umspannwerksautomatisierungsprojekten zu gewährleisten. Sie werden Teil einer Weltklasse-Engineering-Community in unserem European Hub sein und gemeinsam mit erfahrenen Kollegen mit tiefem Know-how bei der Umsetzung großer und technisch anspruchsvoller Projekte weltweit zusammenarbeiten. Diese Position bietet ein hervorragendes Umfeld, um ein nachhaltiges, flexibles und sicheres Energiesystem zu entwickeln, zu wachsen und einen sinnvollen Beitrag zu Hitachi Energy zu leisten. Es ist eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, der Energiewende zu einer Zeit beizutreten, in der Strom zunehmend zum Rückgrat einer nachhaltigen Gesellschaft wird.

Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben
- Zusammenarbeit mit dem Projekt-Kernteam zur Entwicklung von Schutz- und Steuerungskonzepten für (Sub-)Transmissionssysteme, die eng mit Kunden in der Basisplanungsphase zusammenarbeiten
- Um den detaillierten Engineering-Bereich von Protection & Control zu koordinieren und zu koordinieren, in enger Abstimmung mit anderen Ingenieurdisziplinen wie SCADA und Network & Cyber Security
- Unterstützung der Konstruktion und/oder Konfiguration von Schutz- und Steuerungs-IEDs für (Unter-)Transmissions-Unterstationen, um sicherzustellen, dass Lösungen Kundenspezifikationen erfüllen
- Nehmen Sie an und helfen Sie bei unseren Testanlagen in Baden (Schweiz), einschließlich Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT), die in Zusammenarbeit mit Kunden durchgeführt werden

Ihr Hintergrund
- Bachelor-Abschluss in Elektrotechnik oder Äquivalent (z.B. Technikerschule), mit relevanten Erfahrungen in Umspannautomationssystemen
- Kenntnisse der Unterstations- und Schutzsysteme, einschließlich Kommunikationsstandards wie IEC 61850
- Erfahrung mit dem Schutz- und Kontrollportfolio von Hitachi Energy (Relion® Familie) ist ein Vorteil
- Offener Teamplayer mit einem starken Fokus auf Kundenzufriedenheit, Sicherheit, Qualität und Effizienz
- Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und effektiv mit mehreren Stakeholdern in einem Projektumfeld zu koordinieren
- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und das Vertrauen in technische Entscheidungen
- fließend in Englisch, geschrieben und gesprochen, deutsche Sprache ist ein Vorteil

Mehr über uns
Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'opportunité Pour renforcer notre équipe, nous sommes à la recherche d'un ingénieur de projet – Grid Automation Control & Protection pour soutenir la livraison réussie de projets d'automatisation de réseau dans toute l'Europe. Dans ce rôle, vous collaborerez étroitement avec la gestion de projet, d'autres équipes d'ingénierie et des clients afin de fournir le contrôle et la protection des projets complexes d'automatisation des sous-stations. Vous ferez partie d'une communauté d'ingénieurs de calibre mondial au sein de notre European Hub, en collaboration avec des collègues expérimentés possédant une expertise approfondie dans l'exécution de grands projets techniquement exigeants dans le monde entier. Cette position offre un excellent environnement pour apprendre, grandir et apporter une contribution significative à l'objectif d'Hitachi Energy de faire progresser un système énergétique durable, flexible et sûr. C'est une occasion unique de rejoindre la transition énergétique à un moment où l'électricité devient de plus en plus l'épine dorsale d'une société durable.

Comment vous ferez un impact
- Collaborer avec l'équipe centrale du projet pour développer des concepts de protection et de contrôle pour les systèmes de (sous-)transmission, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les clients pendant la phase de conception de base
- Contribuer à la protection et au contrôle et coordonner la portée technique détaillée, en travaillant en alignement étroit avec d'autres disciplines d'ingénierie telles que SCADA et Network & Cyber Security
- Soutenir la conception et/ou la configuration des dispositifs de protection et de contrôle des sous-stations de transport, en veillant à ce que les solutions répondent aux spécifications du client
- Participer et aider à des activités de test en usine dans nos installations d'essais à Baden (Suisse), y compris les tests d'acceptation en usine (FAT) réalisés en partenariat avec des clients

Vos antécédents
- Baccalauréat en génie électrique ou équivalent (par exemple Technikerschule), avec une expérience pertinente dans les systèmes d'automatisation des sous-stations
- Connaissance des systèmes de contrôle et de protection des sous-stations, y compris les normes de communication telles que la CEI 61850
- Expérience de la protection et du contrôle du portefeuille IED d'Hitachi Energy (famille Rélion®) est un avantage
- Joueur d'équipe ouvert d'esprit avec un accent fort sur la satisfaction des clients, la sécurité, la qualité et l'efficacité
- Capacité de travailler de façon indépendante tout en coordonnant efficacement avec plusieurs intervenants dans un environnement de projet
- Fortes compétences en communication et confiance dans la prise de décisions techniques
- La langue allemande est un avantage

Plus sur nous
Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et croître.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Sulla posizione Per la nostra produzione industriale 4.0-capable di semiconduttori di potenza siamo alla ricerca di una personalità dedicata e tecnicamente versata come un Process & Equipment Technician. Con il tuo know-how nella tecnologia del sistema e nell'automazione, guidi ad alta disponibilità di impianti, risoluzione dei problemi, miglioramento dell'azionamento e supporto ai tuoi colleghi in problemi tecnici. Insieme al team di ingegneri, portate la nostra produzione al livello successivo e accompagnate l'integrazione di nuovi impianti nei processi produttivi in corso. Questo può essere fatto calibrando, mantenendo e mantenendo impianti e componenti di risoluzione dei problemi indipendenti e risoluzione dei problemi di complessi sistemi di produzione (2 ° terzo livello) manutenzione preventiva e condizionale per minimizzare la documentazione di standstill e la comunicazione delle condizioni degli impianti e degli adattamenti tecnici Monitoraggio della conformità del processo e del controllo della qualità (SPC) Attuazione delle misure di miglioramento in collaborazione con l'ingegneria e il supporto Formazione e supporto dei colleghi in materia tecnica
• Requisiti - Allenamento completo EFZ come automatico, elettronico o polimeccanico - Fondata formazione elettrotecnica di base, ideale con ulteriore formazione come tecnico di sistema - Esperienza pluriennale nella manutenzione o nell'automazione degli impianti di produzione - Ottima conoscenza della tecnologia di controllo, della programmazione pneumatica e/o robot - Funzionamento strutturato, analitico e indipendente - Buona conoscenza del tedesco (C1) e dell'inglese (B2) Cosa? - Posto di lavoro sicuro in una società orientata al futuro - Una squadra collegiale con un breve processo decisionale - Condizioni di lavoro interessanti e possibilità di sviluppo Contatto - Altro su di noi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione About the position For our Industry 4.0-capable production of power semiconductors we are looking for a dedicated and technically versed personality as a Process & Equipment Technician. With your know-how in system technology and automation, you drive for high plant availability, troubleshooting, drive improvements and support your colleagues in technical issues. Together with the engineering team, you bring our production to the next level and accompany the integration of new plants into ongoing production processes. This can be done by calibrating, maintaining and maintaining plants and components independent troubleshooting and troubleshooting of complex production systems (2nd/3rd level) preventive and conditional maintenance to minimize standstill documentation and communication of plant condition and technical adjustments Monitoring process compliance and quality control (SPC) Implementation of improvement measures in cooperation with engineering and support Training and support of colleagues in technical matters Ensuring work safety in all
• Requisiti - Completed training EFZ as an automatic, electronic or polymechanical - Found basic electrotechnical training, ideally with further training as a system technician - Multiannual experience in the maintenance or automation of production plants - Very good knowledge of control technology, pneumatics and/or robot programming - Structured, analytical and independent operation - Good knowledge of German (C1) and English (B2)
• Cosa offriamo - Secure workplace in a future-oriented company - A collegial team with short decision-making - Attractive employment conditions and development possibilities Contatto - More about us

jobs.description: The opportunity We're looking for a  Talent Acquisition Partner  to join our dynamic team and support our German-speaking market. descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione
L'opportunità per la nostra Business Unit Prodotti ad alta tensione a Zurigo-Oerlikon, stiamo cercando un ingegnere R&D per rafforzare il nostro team per lo sviluppo di Interruttori ad alta tensione. Se siete appassionati di risolvere problemi multi-fisici altamente complessi e volete lavorare con gli esperti leader nel mondo per sviluppare i circuiti di alta tensione di alta classe, questa è la vostra occasione. Unisciti al nostro team innovativo e fai parte di un ambiente di lavoro internazionale a Zurigo.

# Come farai un impatto #
- Eseguire attività ingegneristiche relative allo sviluppo di prodotti per progetti specifici R&D dal concept all'implementazione di serie, assicurando l'allineamento tecnico con esperti e stakeholder di progetto
- Sostenere il Design Lead negli argomenti di sviluppo del prodotto e garantire la documentazione strutturata delle attività di sviluppo
- Pianificare e supervisionare il montaggio, lo smontaggio e l'ispezione di prototipi insieme ad altri esperti
- Contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei processi e delle attività R&D

# Il tuo sfondo #
- Laurea magistrale in ingegneria meccanica o un soggetto strettamente correlato da un'università politecnica/tecnica
- L'esperienza di lavoro in un ambiente R&D è un plus
- L'esperienza nella gestione del progetto è un plus
- Buon know-how negli strumenti software 3D CAD e FEM richiesti
- Alte aspettative sulla qualità del lavoro in tutti i settori
- Personalità indipendente, proattiva e orientata agli obiettivi
- Praticamente orientato e pratico modo di lavorare
- Automotivata, impegnata, disposta ad imparare
- Eccellente capacità di comunicazione
- Ottimo comando di inglese e tedesco, sia scritto che parlato

## More about us
A Hitachi Energy, la nostra cultura è costruita su collaborazione, diversità e apprendimento continuo. Crediamo che le migliori idee derivino dal lavorare insieme in culture e discipline, abbracciando diverse prospettive e promuovendo un ambiente inclusivo. Incoraggiamo curiosità e innovazione, fornendo opportunità di crescita personale e professionale. Unisciti a noi e fai parte di un team globale che sta plasmando un futuro energetico sostenibile.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity For our Business Unit High Voltage Products in Zurich-Oerlikon, we are looking for an R&D Engineer to strengthen our team for High Voltage Circuit Breakers development. If you are passionate about solving highly complex multi-physical problems and want to work with world-leading experts to develop best-in-class High Voltage Circuit Breakers, this is your chance. Join our innovative team and be part of an international working environment in Zurich.

## How you'll make an impact
- Execute product-development-related engineering activities for specific R&D projects from concept to series implementation, ensuring technical alignment with cross-functional experts and project stakeholders
- Support the Design Lead in product development topics and ensure structured documentation of development activities
- Plan and supervise assembly, disassembly and inspection of prototypes together with other experts
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of R&D processes and activities

## Your background
- Master's degree in mechanical engineering or a closely related subject from a Polytechnical/Technical University
- Working experience in an R&D environment is a plus
- Experience in project management is a plus
- Good know-how in 3D CAD and FEM software tools required
- High expectations on quality of work in all regards
- Independent, proactive and goal-oriented personality
- Practically oriented and hands-on way of working
- Self-motivated, committed, willing to learn
- Excellent communication skills
- Excellent command of English and German, both written and spoken

## More about us
At Hitachi Energy, our culture is built on collaboration, diversity and continuous learning. We believe that the best ideas come from working together across cultures and disciplines, embracing different perspectives and fostering an inclusive environment. We encourage curiosity and innovation, providing opportunities for personal and professional growth. Join us and be part of a global team that is shaping a sustainable energy future.

jobs.title: Transport, Trade & Logistics Specialist Domestic 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Transport, Trade & Logistics Specialist Domestic at HITACHI ENERGY LTD, you will be responsible for the efficient and compliant movement of goods within national borders, ensuring timely delivery, cost-effectiveness, and adherence to all domestic transportation and trade regulations. How you'll make an impact Plan, organize, and monitor domestic transportation of goods, including selection of carriers, negotiation of rates and optimization of routes to minimize costs and maximize efficiency. Prepare and process all necessary documentation for domestic shipments, such as packing lists and forwarding orders, ensuring accuracy and completeness. Coordinate with internal departments (e.g., production, sales, warehousing) and external stakeholders (e.g., carriers or customers) to ensure smooth logistics operations. Track and trace domestic shipments, proactively identifying and resolving any delays, issues, or discrepancies. Manage and maintain relationships with domestic carriers and logistics service providers, evaluating performance and ensuring adherence to service level agreements. Ensure compliance with all relevant domestic transportation laws, regulations, and company policies Identify and implement continuous improvement initiatives for domestic logistics processes to enhance efficiency, reduce costs and improve service levels. Handle domestic freight claims and resolve shipping discrepancies with carriers. Participate in logistics-related projects and initiatives as required.
